content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 19, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 19 focused on stabilizing the elizaOS live runtime, enhancing cloud deployment infrastructure, and improving local inference capabilities. Key achievements include resolving critical boot deadlocks, refining mobile/desktop build processes, and addressing billing record errors in the cloud API.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & API Enhancements**
*   Completed the cloud deployment server-side logic by adding `POST /api/v1/apps/[id]/deploy` and status endpoints ([#7804](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7804)).
*   Resolved a boot deadlock in cloud Docker containers caused by TLA and barrel-import conflicts ([#7801](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7801)).
*   Configured Flathub-ready builds by committing `node-sources.json` and setting the app to offline mode ([#7802](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7802)).

**OS Runtime & Build Stability**
*   Fixed packaging blockers for `elizaOS` live runtime plugins and polished branding/update materialization ([#7800](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7800), [#7797](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7797)).
*   Improved build reliability by resolving Capacitor CLI paths from workspace installs and supporting nested desktop workspace builds ([#7799](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7799), [#7798](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7798)).
*   Hardened smoke checks and USB installer boundaries for shared Git worktrees ([#7790](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7790)).

**Inference & Training Optimization**
*   Added a `--low-vram-smoke` CLI preset for 2B SFT training on 12GB consumer GPUs ([#7805](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7805)).
*   Wired slot save/restore and prewarm functionality through FFI for local inference ([#7796](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7796)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7812](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7812): Fixes to restore desktop release inputs.
*   [#7808](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7808): Implements async suspend/resume via job queue for cloud services.
*   [#7793](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7793): CI improvements for Green and Hetzner E2E testing.
*   [#7792](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7792): Fixes for Android local MTP and OmniVoice inference.
*   [#7791](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7791): Salvage of orphaned work from concurrent agent development.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Cloud API Billing Reliability**
*   [#7794](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7794): Resolved HTTP 500 errors in non-streaming chat completions by making billing audit-row failures non-fatal, improving error logging for database issues, and redacting sensitive SQL/bind parameters from API responses.

## NEW ISSUES
*   [#7794](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7794): Addressed a failure where non-streaming `/v1/chat/completions` returned 500 errors due to billing record insertion issues.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *None.*
